overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through rain-soaked neon-lit Night City streets at night. The journey transitions from dense urban commercial districts with holographic signage through industrial underpasses to an open desert highway, with heavy rain and cyberpunk neon aesthetics throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy commercial street with neon signage

events.description: slows down approaching intersection with red traffic light
makes right turn at intersection onto industrial street

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets through commercial district, observing neon signs and avoiding pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking along sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow neon sign reading CHOICE suspended over the street
multi-story buildings with glowing windows and holographic advertisements
tall sodium vapor lamps casting amber light through the heavy rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through rain-slicked commercial streets at night. The iconic yellow CHOICE neon sign dominates the view ahead while pedestrians walk the sidewalks. The driver slows for a red light before turning right into a more industrial area.

events.description: stops at red traffic light waiting for signal change
accelerates through intersection as traffic light turns green

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through industrial district, stopping at signals and sharing road with other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving in the opposite direction through the intersection

entered.detail: concrete industrial warehouses covered in colorful graffiti and neon lighting
large holographic advertisement screen displaying animated content
massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through the industrial quarter with concrete warehouses and graffiti-covered walls lining the streets. The vehicle passes under a large concrete overpass and waits at a traffic light while a yellow taxi passes by. Digital billboards and street lights illuminate the rainy night.

events.description: enters dark underpass beneath highway, visibility drops significantly
navigates sharp turn between concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: carefully driving through enclosed industrial passages and dark underpasses with reduced visibility

entered.detail: thick concrete support columns lining both sides of the narrow passage
rough concrete walls covered in graffiti and industrial markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark, enclosed underpass beneath the highway infrastructure. Concrete pillars and walls create a narrow corridor with minimal lighting, requiring careful navigation. The rain continues but is less visible in the sheltered space, with only the vehicle's headlights and sparse artificial lights illuminating the graffiti-covered concrete.

events.description: exits urban underpass onto open highway leaving the city behind
accelerates to high speed on straight desert highway reaching 90 km/h

agents.ego_description: speeding down open highway through desolate landscape, leaving the urban environment behind

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines stretching into the distance
sparse desert vegetation and open terrain visible beyond the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the confined underpass, the scene opens onto a wide desert highway with the city now behind. Power lines and transmission towers line the right side while sparse desert vegetation stretches to the horizon. The vehicle accelerates to high speed on the straight open road, with rain still falling but sky partially visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a futuristic vehicle as it moves from a vibrant commercial district into a gritty industrial quarter. It begins by navigating rain-slicked streets dominated by the glow of a yellow CHOICE neon sign and the presence of pedestrians on the sidewalks. As the driver slows for a red light, the camera turns right, shifting the environment from bright storefronts to a landscape of concrete warehouses and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then progresses under a massive concrete overpass, where digital billboards and street lights illuminate the rainy night. Finally, the vehicle pauses at another traffic light, watching a yellow taxi pass by amidst the industrial architecture.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a claustrophobic urban underpass into the vast openness of a desert highway. It begins within a dark, enclosed corridor beneath highway infrastructure, where the headlights cut through the gloom to reveal graffiti-covered concrete pillars and narrow walls. As the vehicle pushes forward, the oppressive shelter of the underpass gives way to a wide, straight road that opens up into a sprawling desert landscape. The scene then expands to reveal power lines and transmission towers lining the roadside against a horizon of sparse vegetation, while the rain continues to fall under a partially visible sky. Finally, the camera accelerates rapidly along the open asphalt, leaving the city behind for the emptiness of the wasteland.
